settings.name: Ankit
settings.title: Software Developer
settings.summary: Focused on building reliable backend systems, REST APIs, and scalable architectures with Node.js, MongoDB, and AWS

description: Built enterprise-grade data privacy and cookie consent modules using React.js and Node.js, ensuring GDPR compliance across 10,000+ users
Developed and maintained test suites using Jest and Cypress, improving code reliability in production.
Monitored and debugged production incidents via Datadog — analysing 4xx/5xx errors, tracing API failures, and resolving log anomalies.
Collaborated in Agile sprints with PR-based workflows and CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, Harness), contributing to staged production deployments across multiple sprint cycles.
Revamped froontend architecture to enhance page load speed by 0.5s, boosting user experience .
Transaled user feedback into actionable UI/UX improvements, streamining dashboard navigation and increasing user engagement by 20%.
Built an admin dashboard in React + TypeScript for managing thousands of users.

items.title: ResumeIQ
items.description: AI-powered ATS Resume Analyzer using React, TypeScript, and Supabase; supports 10+ templates with real-time scoring, attracting 1,000+ users and 5,000+ page views.

items.title: Study Notion
items.description: Ed-tech platform for creating and rating content with full auth; integrated Razorpay for payments and validated flows via Postman.

items.title: Syncro
items.description: A full-stack AI-integrated project management tool built with React, TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB and Redis. Syncro helps teams plan, track and execute work in real time — featuring task boards, AI assistance, collaboration tools and a scalable backend architecture.

items.title: PrepAI
items.description: An AI-powered interview preparation platform built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS and OpenRouter. PrepAI generates role-specific technical questions, HR questions, DSA problems, system design prompts and personalized study checklists to help software engineers prepare efficiently for interviews.
